query_text: CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_activity_insert(@tvp_activity    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@system_datetime            DATETIME2   ,@is_retry                         BIT = 0 OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT;SELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@activity_id = activity_idFROM   @tvp_activity;IF @@rowcount <> 1BEGINSELECT @error_code = 50001  ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;END;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.log_activity aWHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND a.activity_id = @activity_id)BEGINSELECT @is_retry = 1;SELECT @error_message = 'Activity already exist';THROW 50002,@error_message,1;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.log_activity   (system_id   ,activity_id   ,activity_code   ,activity_type   ,message_type   ,activity_date   ,activity_datetime   ,sell_request_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,ticket_id   ,sell_request_status   ,ticket_status   ,counter_offer_type   ,collation_type   ,bet_intercept_reason   ,counter_offer_count   ,collation_sequence   ,usp_name   ,activity_data   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,error_text   ,create_at   ,update_at   ,gzip_activity_data)SELECT system_id  ,activity_id  ,activity_code  ,activity_type  ,message_type  ,activity_date  ,activity_datetime  ,sell_request_id  ,counter_offer_id  ,ticket_id  ,sell_request_status  ,ticket_status  ,counter_offer_type  ,collation_type  ,bet_intercept_reason  ,counter_offer_count  ,collation_sequence  ,usp_name  ,NULL   -- activity_data  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,error_text  ,@system_datetime  ,@system_datetime  ,gzip_activity_dataFROM   @tvp_activity;END;UPDATE dbo.defer_activitySET    activity_status = 1,update_at = @system_datetimeWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND @activity_id = activity_id AND activity_status = 0;END;

dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer               dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@account                     dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@location                    dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                          VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@tvp_ticket dbo.udt_ticket;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @now, @is_retry OUTPUT;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;--BEGIN--    SET NOCOUNT ON;--    -- Set Default values-- CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_get(--Input Parameters@bizdate             DATE -- output   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Get Pool DescriptionBEGIN TRYBEGIN TRANSACTION;IF @bizdate IS NULLBEGINSET @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_bizdate();END;DECLARE    @schedule_task TABLE(task_id    BIGINT);UPDATE aSET    a.task_status = 1,a.no_of_execution = ISNULL(a.no_of_execution,0)+1,a.update_at = @nowOUTPUT inserted.task_id   INTO @schedule_taskFROM   dbo.log_task aWHERE  a.bizdate <= @bizdate AND a.task_status = 0 AND a.task_type = 2-- 1:report, 2:adhocAND (a.schedule_at IS NULL OR a.schedule_at < @now_with_offset);-- tasksSELECT b.task_id  ,b.bizdate  ,b.task_type  ,b.task_status  ,b.schedule_at  ,b.checkpoint_id  ,b.no_of_execution  ,c.task_handlerFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_task b ON b.task_id = a.task_id   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task c ON c.task_id = a.task_idORDER BY b.task_id;-- task default parametersSELECT a.task_id  ,b.parameter_name  ,b.parameter_type  ,b.parameter_valueFROM   @schedule_task a   INNER JOIN dbo.log_adhoc_task_parameter b ON a.task_id = b.task_idORDER BY b.task_id,b.parameter_name;COMMIT TRANSACTION;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater(@sell_request     dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg          dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@now                         DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@count                   INT = 0;DECLARE    @bizdate                DATE  ,@channel_type        TINYINT  ,@channel_device_type TINYINT  ,@channel_report_type TINYINT  ,@activity_id          BIGINT  ,@db_activity_id       BIGINT = 0  ,@db_exists               BIT = 0  ,@system_id           TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id      BIGINT;SELECT @bizdate = bizdate  ,@channel_type = channel_type  ,@channel_device_type = channel_device_type  ,@channel_report_type = channel_report_type  ,@activity_id = activity_id  ,@system_id = system_id  ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_idFROM   @sell_request;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINRETURN; -- sell_request record not found, skipEND;-- get db activity_idSELECT @db_activity_id = update_activity_id  ,@db_exists = 1FROM   dbo.sell_request WITH (FORCESEEK)WHERE  @system_id = system_id AND @sell_request_id = sell_request_idORDER BY update_activity_id DESC;-- skip update if db record is newerIF @db_activity_id >= @activity_idBEGINRETURN;END;IF @db_exists = 1BEGINUPDATE dbsrSET    dbsr.parent_sell_request_id = sr.parent_sell_request_id,dbsr.ticket_id = sr.ticket_id,dbsr.unit_bet_updated = sr.unit_bet_updated,dbsr.investment_updated = sr.investment_updated,dbsr.tsn = sr.tsn,dbsr.rtsn = sr.rtsn,dbsr.bet_line = sr.bet_line,dbsr.update_at = @now,dbsr.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request dbsr WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @sell_request sr ON dbsr.system_id = sr.system_id AND dbsr.sell_request_id = sr.sell_request_id;UPDATE dbsrlSET    dbsrl.odds_counter_offered = srl.odds_counter_offered,dbsrl.update_at = @now,dbsrl.update_activity_id = @activity_idFROM   dbo.sell_request_leg dbsrl WITH (FORCESEEK)   INNER JOIN @leg srl ON dbsrl.system_id = srl.system_id AND dbsrl.sell_request_id = srl.sell_request_id AND dbsrl.pool_id = srl.pool_id AND dbsrl.line_id = srl.line_id AND dbsrl.combination_id = srl.combination_id;END;ELSEBEGININSERT INTO dbo.sell_request   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,odds_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_formula   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,request_at   ,location_type   ,channel_type   ,channel_device_type   ,channel_report_type   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,financial_index   ,num_bet   ,unit_bet   ,unit_bet_updated   ,investment   ,investment_updated   ,tsn   ,rtsn   ,bet_line   ,result_code   ,result_text   ,race_no   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,parent_sell_request_id  ,ticket_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,odds_type  ,is_allup  ,allup_level  ,allup_formula  ,allup_type  ,@bizdate  ,request_at  ,location_type  ,channel_type  ,channel_device_type  ,channel_report_type  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,financial_index  ,num_bet  ,unit_bet  ,unit_bet_updated  ,investment  ,investment_updated  ,tsn  ,rtsn  ,bet_line  ,result_code  ,result_text  ,race_no  ,@now  ,activity_id  ,@now  ,activity_idFROM   @sell_request;INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_leg   (system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,bizdate   ,sports_id   ,leg_order   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,combination_order   ,is_inplay   ,odds   ,odds_counter_offered   ,ems_sequence   ,event_id   ,event_operation_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_request_id  ,dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,sports_id  ,leg_order  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,combination_order  ,is_inplay  ,odds  ,odds_counter_offered  ,ems_sequence  ,event_id  ,event_operation_status  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @leg;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_divcal(    @activity        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@divcal         dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@divcal_plc dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg             NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0          ,@is_cancel             BIT = 1          ,@is_reverse            BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- set default value, expecially ticket_id, coz it maybe pointing to child ticket_id after partial pay        DECLARE                @system_id                TINYINT              ,@ticket_id                 BIGINT -- TODO: for checking parent ticket id              ,@divcal_new dbo.udt_ticket_divcal;        SELECT @system_id = system_id              ,@ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   @divcal;        SELECT @ticket_id = ticket_id        FROM   dbo.ticket_payout        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND next_ticket_id = @ticket_id;        --        -- set parent @ticket_id        INSERT INTO @divcal_new               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,child_ticket_id               ,divcal_amount               ,selective_refund_amount               ,is_divcal_done               ,activity_id)        SELECT bizdate              ,system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,ticket_id              ,divcal_amount              ,selective_refund_amount              ,is_divcal_done              ,activity_id        FROM   @divcal;        --        -- divcal        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal              @divcal_new,             @system_datetime;        --        -- divcal plc for selective refund        EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc              @divcal_plc,             @system_datetime;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal_plc(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal_plc READONLY   ,@now                  DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @i                       INT = 1          ,@error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT'          ,@bizdate                DATE          ,@system_id           TINYINT          ,@ticket_id            BIGINT          ,@pool_id              BIGINT          ,@line_id            SMALLINT          ,@combination_id     SMALLINT          ,@activity_id          BIGINT;    SELECT @bizdate = bizdate          ,@system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id    FROM   @data;    --    IF @@rowcount = 0    BEGIN        RETURN;    END;    -- for handling incoming divcal async case if any    IF NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND update_activity_id >= @activity_id    )    BEGIN        -- skip checking bizdate        DELETE dbo.ticket_divcal_plc        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_divcal_plc               (bizdate               ,system_id               ,ticket_id               ,pool_id               ,line_id               ,combination_id               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        SELECT @bizdate              ,@system_id              ,@ticket_id              ,pool_id              ,line_id              ,combination_id              ,@activity_id              ,@now              ,@activity_id              ,@now        FROM   @data;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer(    @activity                   dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request               dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@data         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@now                                   DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@i                       INT = 1;    DECLARE            @system_id              TINYINT          ,@sell_request_id         BIGINT          ,@parent_sell_request_id  BIGINT          ,@activity_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_code          TINYINT          ,@sell_request_status    TINYINT          ,@bizdate                   DATE;    -- prepare    SELECT @activity_code = activity_code          ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status    FROM   @activity;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@sell_request_id = sell_request_id          ,@parent_sell_request_id = parent_sell_request_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@bizdate = bizdate    FROM   @sell_request;    --    -- Update Parent Sell Request Counter Offer Status    IF @parent_sell_request_id > 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @parent_sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@parent_sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,1 -- Accept               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --    -- Update Current Sell Request Counter Offer Status    DECLARE            @counter_offer_status TINYINT = 0; -- None, default    -- Accept Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 1 -- Accept    WHERE  @activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRM           AND @sell_request_status <> 3; --AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT    -- Reject Case:    SELECT @counter_offer_status = 2 -- Reject    WHERE  @activity_code IN(6,7) --CUSTOMER_ABORT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT           AND @sell_request_status IN(8); --ABORTED    --    IF @sell_request_id > 0 AND @counter_offer_status <> 0 AND NOT EXISTS    (        SELECT 1        FROM   dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND sell_request_id = @sell_request_id    )    BEGIN        INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer_status               (system_id               ,sell_request_id               ,bizdate               ,counter_offer_status               ,create_activity_id               ,create_at               ,update_activity_id               ,update_at)        VALUES               (@system_id               ,@sell_request_id               ,@bizdate               ,@counter_offer_status               ,@activity_id               ,@now               ,@activity_id               ,@now);    END;    --sell_request_counter_offer    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_counter_offer           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,counter_offer_id           ,record_at           ,unit_bet           ,total_investment           ,unit_bet_prev           ,total_investment_prev           ,managed_by           ,create_activity_id           ,create_at           ,update_activity_id           ,update_at)    SELECT @system_id          ,s.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,s.counter_offer_id          ,s.record_at          ,s.unit_bet          ,s.total_investment          ,s.unit_bet_prev          ,s.total_investment_prev          ,s.managed_by          ,@activity_id          ,@now          ,@activity_id          ,@now    FROM   @data s           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_counter_offer t WITH (FORCESEEK) ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.sell_request_id = s.sell_request_id AND t.counter_offer_id = s.counter_offer_id    WHERE  t.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_account(    @account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_account           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,account_no           ,account_transaction_no           ,account_category_id           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.account_no          ,a.account_transaction_no          ,a.account_category          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @account a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_account sra WITH(FORCESEEK) ON sra.system_id = a.system_id AND sra.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.account_no IS NOT NULL AND a.account_no <> '' AND sra.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater(@activity      dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request  dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@account         dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@ticket              dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                      DATETIME2   ,@checkpoint_id               BIGINT = 0)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code                  INT = 0  ,@error_message     NVARCHAR(250) = ''  ,@i_log_bet_type          TINYINT = 1  ,@is_insert_needed            BIT = 0  ,@is_reverse                  BIT  ,@is_cancel_reverse           BIT;DECLARE    @activity_id                    BIGINT  ,@system_id                     TINYINT  ,@sell_request_id                BIGINT  ,@parent_sell_request_id         BIGINT  ,@log_bet_type                  TINYINT  ,@log_bet_category              TINYINT  ,@last_ticket_action            TINYINT  ,@ticket_id                      BIGINT  ,@counter_offer_id               BIGINT  ,@collation_sequence             BIGINT  ,@account_no                VARCHAR(16)  ,@account_category                  INT  ,@centre_no                         INT  ,@channel_type                  TINYINT  ,@window_no                    SMALLINT  ,@is_on_course                      BIT  ,@result_code                       INT  ,@unit_bet               DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@financial_index               TINYINT  ,@flag                          TINYINT  ,@remark                   VARCHAR(250)  ,@reject_code                  SMALLINT  ,@reject_reason            VARCHAR(250)  ,@activity_code                 TINYINT  ,@activity_type                 TINYINT  ,@message_type                  TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status           TINYINT  ,@ticket_status                 TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type            TINYINT  ,@collation_type                TINYINT  ,@bet_intercept_reason          TINYINT  ,@bizdate                          DATE  ,@request_at                  DATETIME2  ,@sports_id                     TINYINT;--SELECT  @activity;SELECT @account_no = account_no  ,@account_category = account_categoryFROM   @account;--SELECT @centre_no = centre_no--FROM   @location;---- Delete log_bet record for sell undo and ticket cancel undo caseSELECT @system_id = system_id  ,@ticket_id = ticket_idFROM   @ticket;--SELECT @is_reverse = is_reverse  ,@is_cancel_reverse = is_cancel_reverseFROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_statusWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;IF @is_reverse = 1 -- Sell Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 1; -- AcceptEND;IF @is_cancel_reverse = 1 -- Ticket Cancel Undo CaseBEGINDELETE dbo.log_betWHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND log_bet_type = 2 AND log_bet_category = 6; -- Reject, CancelEND;---- check all possible bet_type for each sell_requestWHILE @i_log_bet_type < 4 -- 1 Accept, 2 Reject, 3 Counter OfferBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 0;SET @log_bet_category = 0;-- check @activity_statusIF @i_log_bet_type = 1 -- accept   AND @activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY   AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD   AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3) --REVERSE_CANCELBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;SET @log_bet_category = @counter_offer_type;--SELECT @unit_bet = unit_bet FROM  @ticket;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 2 -- reject   AND @result_code > 0 -- AP indicated reject   AND (@ticket_status <> 5 OR @ticket_status IS NULL) -- null: for request rejected by AP-- AND @checkpoint_id; > 0 -- from RM-- AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL-- AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTEDBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 2xx Customer / Trader / System / Customer Timeout / Trader Timeout--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @sell_request_status = 8; -- Customer?SELECT @log_bet_category = 3; -- defaultSELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @sell_request_status = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3--WHERE  @sell_request_status = 9;SELECT @log_bet_category = 4WHERE  @sell_request_status = 7;SELECT @log_bet_category = 5WHERE  @sell_request_status = 6;END;IF @i_log_bet_type = 3 -- counter offer   AND @sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED   AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFERBEGINSET @is_insert_needed = 1;-- 3xx Trader / SystemMNL / SystemOdds--SELECT @log_bet_category = 1 WHERE  @counter_offer_type = 3;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 2 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 5;--SELECT @log_bet_category = 3 WHERE  @bet_intercept_reason = 7;-- 3xx System / Trader: after FR_4613 simplification on 2020-05-06SELECT @log_bet_category = 1WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(1,2);SELECT @log_bet_category = 2WHERE  @counter_offer_type IN(3);END;--IF @is_insert_needed = 1 -- insert accept / reject / counter (activity_id   ,system_id   ,sell_request_id   ,parent_sell_request_id   ,log_bet_type   ,log_bet_category   ,ticket_id   ,sports_id   ,counter_offer_id   ,collation_sequence   ,account_no ,update_at)VALUES   (@activity_id   ,@system_id   ,@sell_request_id   ,@parent_sell_request_id   ,@log_bet_type   ,@log_bet_category   ,@ticket_id   ,@sports_id   ,@counter_offer_id   ,@collation_sequence   ,@account_no   ,@account_category   ,@channel_type   ,@window_no   ,@is_on_course   ,@centre_no   ,@unit_bet   ,@financial_index   ,@flag   ,@remark   ,@reject_code   ,@reject_reason   ,@activity_code   ,@activity_type   ,@message_type   ,@sell_request_status   ,@ticket_status   ,@counter_offer_type   ,@collation_type   ,@bet_intercept_reason   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@bizdate   ,@request_at   ,@now   ,@now);END;SET @i_log_bet_type+=1;END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_sell(-- activity@tvp_activity                        dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                        dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                             dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer         dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY-- ticket_location   ,@location                             dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY-- account    ,@account                               dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY-- ticket info   ,@tvp_ticket                                dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_status                  dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_single          dbo.udt_ticket_bet_single READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket_bet_allup            dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg                                 NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry              BIT = 0  ,@ticket_status     TINYINT = 2  ,@ticket_action     TINYINT = 1; -- sell ticketDECLARE    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc dbo.udt_ticket_bet_allup_plc;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRY-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @system_datetime, @is_retry OUTPUT;-- insert ticket_sell_cb_location tableEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert  @location, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert  @account, @system_datetime;--init ticket_bet_allup_plcINSERT INTO @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,bet_id   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,unit_bet   ,potential_liability   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,plc_ids)SELECT DISTINCT       system_id  ,ticket_id  ,bet_id  ,sports_id  ,event_type  ,unit_bet  ,potential_liability  ,allup_level  ,allup_type  ,STUFF((SELECT ';'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(19),pool_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),line_id)+'-'+CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),combination_id)FROM    @tvp_ticket_bet_allup tmpWHERE  tmp.system_id = allup.system_id AND tmp.ticket_id = allup.ticket_id AND tmp.bet_id = allup.bet_idORDER BY tmp.pool_id,tmp.line_id,tmp.combination_id FOR XML PATH('')),1,1,'')FROM @tvp_ticket_bet_allup allup;-- insert ticket, ticket_bet_single, ticket_bet_allup and ticket_bet_allup_combination tablesEXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_insert  @tvp_ticket, @tvp_ticket_bet_single, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup, @tvp_ticket_bet_allup_plc, @account, @location, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update  @tvp_ticket_status, @ticket_action, @system_datetime;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request  @tvp_activity, @sell_request, @leg, @counter_offer, @account, @location, @tvp_ticket, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCHIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINDECLARE    @orig_err_num INT = ERROR_NUMBER();SELECT @return_code = CASE @orig_err_num  WHEN 2627 THEN 50016 -- retry required, throw when dealing with sr_account or ticket_status  ELSE @orig_err_num  ENDWHERE  @return_code = 0;SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),@orig_err_num)+': ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request_location(    @location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@now                DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @bizdate                DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()          ,@error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';    INSERT INTO dbo.sell_request_location           (system_id           ,sell_request_id           ,bizdate           ,activity_id           ,process_location           ,centre_no           ,window_no           ,is_svt           ,is_on_course           ,esc_no           ,terminal_no           ,ngbt_bet_mode           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT a.system_id          ,a.sell_request_id          ,@bizdate          ,a.activity_id          ,a.process_location          ,a.centre_no          ,a.window_no          ,a.is_svt          ,a.is_on_course          ,a.esc_no          ,a.terminal_no          ,a.ngbt_bet_mode          ,@now          ,a.activity_id          ,@now          ,a.activity_id    FROM   @location a           LEFT JOIN dbo.sell_request_location srl WITH (FORCESEEK) ON srl.system_id = a.system_id AND srl.sell_request_id = a.sell_request_id    WHERE  a.sell_request_id > 0 AND srl.system_id IS NULL;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1522(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabiDECLARE @payout_expired_bizdate THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedHOTickets,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @payout_expired_bizdate AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN (div_cal_amt - previous_payout_amt) ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedHOAmount--COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmount,--COUNT(CASE WHEN ( ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,--SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.payout_expire_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.is_head_office = 1) THEN ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS TodayPurgedAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_noISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purgedfmp.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ftd.is_settled,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id--INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = fmp.pool_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON fmp.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2 -- sell, paid, partial_paidAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory  OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_status_update(    @tvp_ticket_status dbo.udt_ticket_status READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_code              INT = 0          ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = ''          ,@count                   INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_id            TINYINT          ,@ticket_id             BIGINT          ,@activity_id           BIGINT          ,@activity_bizdate        DATE          ,@activity_at        DATETIME2          ,@ticket_status        TINYINT          ,@last_ticket_status   TINYINT          ,@sell_activity_id      BIGINT          ,@sell_bizdate            DATE          ,@sell_at            DATETIME2          ,@pay_activity_id       BIGINT          ,@pay_bizdate             DATE          ,@pay_at             DATETIME2          ,@cancel_activity_id    BIGINT          ,@cancel_bizdate          DATE          ,@cancel_at          DATETIME2          ,@is_reverse               BIT          ,@is_pay                   BIT          ,@is_cancel                BIT          ,@is_cancel_reverse        BIT          ,@last_ticket_action   TINYINT          ,@last_activity_id      BIGINT;    SELECT @system_id = system_id          ,@ticket_id = ticket_id          ,@activity_id = activity_id          ,@activity_bizdate = activity_bizdate          ,@activity_at = activity_at          ,@ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    IF @@rowcount <> 1    BEGIN        SELECT @error_code = 50001              ,@error_message = 'The input parameter should have exactly 1 record';        THROW @error_code,@error_message,1;    END;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status_history_mem           (system_id           ,ticket_id           ,activity_id           ,activity_bizdate           ,activity_at           ,ticket_status           ,ticket_action           ,create_at           ,create_activity_id           ,update_at           ,update_activity_id)    SELECT system_id          ,ticket_id          ,activity_id          ,activity_bizdate          ,activity_at          ,ticket_status          ,@ticket_action          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id          ,@system_datetime          ,activity_id    FROM   @tvp_ticket_status;    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_status = ticket_status    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND activity_id > @activity_id    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;    IF @@rowcount = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @ticket_status = @last_ticket_status;    END;    -- determine the sell_activity_id    IF @ticket_action = 1    BEGIN        SELECT @count = COUNT(*)        FROM   dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND ticket_action = 2;        IF @count = 0        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = @activity_id                  ,@sell_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                  ,@sell_at = @activity_at                  ,@is_reverse = 0;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 2        BEGIN            SELECT @sell_activity_id = NULL                  ,@sell_bizdate = NULL                  ,@sell_at = NULL                  ,@is_reverse = 1;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4            BEGIN                SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                            ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 3 OR ticket_action = 4)                ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                -- Payout is the last one                IF @last_ticket_action = 3                BEGIN                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = @last_activity_id                          ,@pay_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                          ,@pay_at = @activity_at                          ,@is_pay = 1;                END;                    ELSE                BEGIN -- UNDO is the last one                    SELECT @pay_activity_id = NULL                          ,@pay_bizdate = NULL                          ,@pay_at = NULL                          ,@is_pay = 0;                END;            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6                BEGIN                    SELECT TOP 1 @last_ticket_action = ticket_action                                ,@last_activity_id = activity_id                    FROM         dbo.ticket_status_history_mem -- try to avoid lock by reading data from in memory table                    WHERE        system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id AND (ticket_action = 5 OR ticket_action = 6)                    ORDER BY activity_id DESC;                    IF @last_ticket_action = 5                    BEGIN                        -- Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = @last_activity_id                              ,@cancel_bizdate = @activity_bizdate                              ,@cancel_at = @activity_at                              ,@is_cancel = 1                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 0;                    END;                        ELSE                    BEGIN                        -- UNDO Cancel is the last one                        SELECT @cancel_activity_id = NULL                              ,@cancel_bizdate = NULL                              ,@cancel_at = NULL                              ,@is_cancel = 0                              ,@is_cancel_reverse = 1;                    END;                END;            END;        END;    END;    IF @ticket_action = 1 OR @ticket_action = 2    BEGIN        UPDATE dbo.ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;--unsettled ticket status UPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status        SET                ticket_status = @ticket_status,            sell_activity_id = @sell_activity_id,            sell_bizdate = @sell_bizdate,            sell_at = @sell_at,            is_reverse = @is_reverse,            update_at = @system_datetime,            update_activity_id = @activity_id        WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;        IF @@rowcount = 0        BEGIN            INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,ticket_status                   ,sell_activity_id                   ,sell_bizdate                   ,sell_at                   ,pay_activity_id                   ,pay_bizdate                   ,pay_at                   ,cancel_activity_id                   ,cancel_bizdate                   ,cancel_at                   ,is_reverse                   ,is_pay                   ,is_cancel                   ,is_cancel_reverse                   ,activity_bizdate                   ,create_at                   ,create_activity_id                   ,update_at                   ,update_activity_id)            VALUES                   (@system_id                   ,@ticket_id                   ,@ticket_status                   ,@sell_activity_id                   ,@sell_bizdate                   ,@sell_at                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,NULL                   ,@is_reverse                   ,0                   ,0                   ,0                   ,@activity_bizdate                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id                   ,@system_datetime                   ,@activity_id);        END;    END;        ELSE    BEGIN        IF @ticket_action = 3 OR @ticket_action = 4        BEGIN            UPDATE dbo.ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status            SET                    ticket_status = @ticket_status,                pay_activity_id = @pay_activity_id,                pay_bizdate = @pay_bizdate,                pay_at = @pay_at,                is_pay = @is_pay,                update_at = @system_datetime,                update_activity_id = @activity_id            WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;            IF @@rowcount = 0            BEGIN                INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,ticket_status                       ,sell_activity_id                       ,sell_bizdate                       ,sell_at                       ,pay_activity_id                       ,pay_bizdate                       ,pay_at                       ,cancel_activity_id                       ,cancel_bizdate                       ,cancel_at                       ,is_reverse                       ,is_pay                       ,is_cancel                       ,is_cancel_reverse                       ,activity_bizdate                       ,create_at                       ,create_activity_id                       ,update_at                       ,update_activity_id)                VALUES                       (@system_id                       ,@ticket_id                       ,@ticket_status                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,@pay_activity_id                       ,@pay_bizdate                       ,@pay_at                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,NULL                       ,0                       ,@is_pay                       ,0                       ,0                       ,@activity_bizdate                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id                       ,@system_datetime                       ,@activity_id);            END;        END;            ELSE        BEGIN            IF @ticket_action = 5 OR @ticket_action = 6            BEGIN                UPDATE dbo.ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;--unsettled ticket statusUPDATE dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                SET                        ticket_status = @ticket_status,                    cancel_activity_id = @cancel_activity_id,                    cancel_bizdate = @cancel_bizdate,                    cancel_at = @cancel_at,                    is_cancel = @is_cancel,                    is_cancel_reverse = @is_cancel_reverse,                    update_at = @system_datetime,                    update_activity_id = @activity_id                WHERE  system_id = @system_id AND ticket_id = @ticket_id;                IF @@rowcount = 0                BEGIN                    INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_ticket_status                           (system_id                           ,ticket_id                           ,ticket_status                           ,sell_activity_id                           ,sell_bizdate                           ,sell_at                           ,pay_activity_id                           ,pay_bizdate                           ,pay_at                           ,cancel_activity_id                           ,cancel_bizdate                           ,cancel_at                           ,is_reverse                           ,is_pay                           ,is_cancel                           ,is_cancel_reverse                           ,activity_bizdate                           ,create_at                           ,create_activity_id                           ,update_at                           ,update_activity_id)                    VALUES                           (@system_id                           ,@ticket_id                           ,@ticket_status                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,NULL                           ,@cancel_activity_id                           ,@cancel_bizdate                           ,@cancel_at                           ,0                           ,0                           ,@is_cancel                           ,@is_cancel_reverse                           ,@activity_bizdate                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id                           ,@system_datetime                           ,@activity_id);                END;            END;        END;    END;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_account_insert(@tvp_ticket_account dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@system_datetime             DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_account   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,account_no   ,account_transaction_no   ,account_category   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,account_no  ,account_transaction_no  ,account_category  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_account;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_eod_settlement_update_ticket(    -- Input Parameter    @bizdate             DATE   ,@system_id        TINYINT    -- Output Parameters   ,@return_msg NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)WITH EXECUTE AS OWNERASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    DECLARE            @now         DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@now_offset  DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset()          ,@record_no         INT          ,@no_of_batch       INT = 10000          ,@return_code       INT = 0          ,@retry_count       INT = 10          ,@retry             INT          ,@row_num        BIGINT = 0;    --common variable    DECLARE            @ticket_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_batch_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_batch;    --cancelled ticket    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet_cancelled;    --cashout    DECLARE            @cashout_normal_setted_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_settled_bet;    ----single    DECLARE            @cashout_single_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    DECLARE            @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    ----allup    DECLARE            @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_ticket;    --normal ticket    DECLARE            @allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids dbo.udt_settlement_tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;    DECLARE            @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    DECLARE            @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_bet;    --cashout diff    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids dbo.udt_settlement_pool_ids;    DECLARE            @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_ticket_batch;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_allup_pool_combination_result;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_single_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    DECLARE            @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp dbo.udt_settlement_cashout_diff;    SET @retry = @retry_count;    WHILE @retry > 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRY            IF @retry != @retry_count            BEGIN                --clear data to reuse table variables                --common variable                DELETE FROM @ticket_batch_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                 --cancelled ticket                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;                --cashout                DELETE FROM @cashout_normal_setted_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_ticket_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_single_bet_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_ticket_tmp;                --DELETE FROM @cashout_allup_bet_financial_tmp;                --normal ticket                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @tournament_allup_pool_event_ids;                DELETE FROM @allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_single_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_losing_financial_tmp;                DELETE FROM @ticket_bet_allup_winning_financial_tmp;                 --cashout diff                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_ids;                DELETE FROM @cashout_ticket_diff_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_pool_combination_result_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_single_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_losing_tmp;                DELETE FROM @cashout_diff_allup_winning_tmp;            END;            -- if input bizdate is null, retrieve the last EOD business date            IF @bizdate IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @bizdate = dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate();            END;                ELSE            BEGIN                IF @bizdate <> dbo.udf_get_last_eos_bizdate()                BEGIN                    SELECT @return_code = 50021                          ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                    THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;                END;            END;            IF NOT EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate            )            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50021                      ,@return_msg = 'Invalid business date';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF @system_id IS NULL            BEGIN                SELECT @return_code = 50000                      ,@return_msg = 'SystemId cannot be NULL';                THROW @return_code,@return_msg,3;            END;            IF EXISTS            (                SELECT 1                FROM   dbo.business_day                WHERE  bizdate = @bizdate AND settlement_at IS NOT NULL            )            BEGIN                RETURN;--support rerun            END;            -- settle single cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);            --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_single_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num                ORDER BY row_num;                SELECT @record_no = @@rowcount;                --delete unsettled_ticket_bet_single                DELETE a                FROM dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single a                     INNER JOIN @ticket_bet_batch_tmp b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id AND a.bet_id = b.bet_id;                COMMIT TRANSACTION;                IF @record_no = 0                BEGIN                    BREAK;                END;                SET @row_num+=@no_of_batch;            END;            -- Settle allup cancel ticket bets            INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                   (system_id                   ,ticket_id                   ,bet_id)            SELECT a.system_id                  ,a.ticket_id                  ,a.bet_id            FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_allup a WITH(NOLOCK)                   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_status s WITH(NOLOCK) ON a.system_id = s.system_id AND a.ticket_id = s.ticket_id            WHERE  a.system_id = @system_id AND (s.is_cancel = 1 OR s.is_reverse = 1);             --            SELECT @row_num = ISNULL(MIN(row_num)-1,0)            FROM   @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp;            WHILE 1 = 1            BEGIN                BEGIN TRANSACTION;                DELETE @ticket_bet_batch_tmp;                INSERT INTO @ticket_bet_batch_tmp                       (system_id                       ,ticket_id                       ,bet_id)                SELECT TOP (@no_of_batch) system_id                                         ,ticket_id                                         ,bet_id                FROM                      @ticket_bet_allup_cancelled_tmp                WHERE                     row_num > @row_num CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_get_ba_rpt_1181(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRYSET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622 IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDDECLARE @late_pay_bizdate intset @late_pay_bizdate = dbo.udf_datetime2bizdate(CONVERT(DATETIME,CAST(@bizdate AS CHAR(8)),112) - 15)SELECT ISNULL(ticket.sports_id, 0)AS SportsID, CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' ENDAS FrontendID,ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0)AS BusinessDateOfEvent,SUM(ticket_count) AS NoOfTicketSold,SUM(ticket_cost_amt) AS InvestmentOfTicketSold,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 0 or ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfPayoutTicket,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 0 or ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt  ELSE 0 END)) AS PayoutOfTicketPaid,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfHOTicketPaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0) THEN ticket.total_payout_amt  ELSE 0 END)) AS PayoutOfHOTicketPaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfLatePayoutTicket,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)) AS LatePayoutOfTicketPaid,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0 and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN 1 ELSE 0 END))  AS NoOfHOTicketLatePaidByBranch,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket.release_to_centre_no <> 0 and ticket.settle_bizdate <= @late_pay_bizdate THEN ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)) AS LatePayoutOfHOTicketPaidByBranchFROM (SELECTDISTINCT (CASE WHEN (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ticket_count,ft.parent_ticket_id,ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.create_bizdate,ftc.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ft.paid_bizdate,ft.is_head_office,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.release_to_centre_no,(ft.total_payout_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt) as total_payout_amt,(CASE WHEN (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate AND ISNULL(ft.parent_ticket_id, 0) = 0 ) THEN ft.ticket_cost_amt  ELSE 0 END) as ticket_cost_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ftd.refund_amt,ftd.settle_bizdateFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftc.pool_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7, 8)ANDftc.leg_order = 1AND (ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate OR ft.paid_bizdate = @bizdate)UNIONSELECTDISTINCT -1 as ticket_count,ft.parent_ticket_id,ft.ticket_id, ft.sports_id, ft.create_bizdate,ftb.frontend_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date  AS kick_off_date,ft.paid_bizdate,ft.is_head_office,ft.selling_bizdate,0 as release_to_centre_no,0 as total_payout_amt,-ft.ticket_cost_amt as ticket_cost_amt,0 as div_cal_amt,0 as refund_amt,0 as settle_bizdateFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_cancel_vw cancel ON ft.ticket_id = cancel.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idWHERE cancel.ticket_status = 5 AND cancel.create_bizdate = @bizdateAND ft.ticket_status = 5 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.sports_id, (CASE WHEN ticket.sports_id = 2 THEN ISNULL(ticket.frontend_id, '') ELSE '' END), ISNULL(ticket.kick_off_date, 0) OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1534](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.selling_bizdate = @bizdate and ticket_status in (2,5,7) THEN ticket.ticket_cost_amt ELSE 0 END)) -SUM(ticket.cancel_amt) AS NetSalesAmount,--NetSalesAmount = Ticket Investment today ?Cancelled Ticket Investment (Cancel is made today)ROUND(SUM((CASE WHEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN (ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - ticket.refund_amt) - (isnull(previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0))) ELSE 0 END) ), 0)AS WinningLiability,--Liability amount of winning tickets (refund tickets are excluded)SUM((CASE WHEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) <> 0 AND ticket.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate THEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END) )AS RefundLiability --Liability amount of refund tickets (winning tickets are excluded)FROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_cancel,ft.selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status,ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt,  AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS actual_div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for same ticketAVG(previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for parent ticketAVG(previous_ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_refund_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS ticket_cost_amt,0 AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd on ft.parent_ticket_id = previous_ftd.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( -- check previous latest dividend historyselect a.ticket_id, a.actual_div_cal_amt, a.div_cal_amt, a.bizdate, a.refund_amt from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ainner join ( select ftdbb.ticket_id , max(bizdate) as bizdate from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ftdbbinner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd on ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate and ftdbb.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idwhere ftdbb.bizdate < @bizdate group by ftdbb.ticket_id) b on a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id and a.bizdate = b.bizdate) previous_ftdbb on previous_ftdbb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idWHERE ftc.bet_type_id IN (--special pool bet_type_id32, 33, 34, 35/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('TSPC', 'MSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC')  --tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2*/)AND (ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate or ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdate)AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7, 8)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 --cancel ticketunion SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --tfe.channel_id,--CBedabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,1 AS is_cancel,0 AS selling_bizdate,ft.ticket_status AS ticket_status,0 AS div_cal_done_bizdate,0 AS paid_bizdate,0 AS total_payout_amt, 0 AS div_cal_amt,0 AS actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS refund_amt,0 AS previous_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS previous_refund_amt,0 AS parent_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0 AS parent_refund_amt,0 AS ticket_cost_amt,AVG(ft.ticket_cost_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftc.ticket_id) AS cancel_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN
