CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_snapshot_oap_participant_insert(@checkpoint_id                           BIGINT = 0   ,@data          dbo.udt_snapshot_oap_participant READONLY)ASBEGIN-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@pool_id            BIGINT  ,@is_exists_other       BIT;SELECT TOP 1 @pool_id = pool_idFROM         pools pWHERE        EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @data dWHERE  p.event_id = d.event_id) AND p.bet_type = 17;IF @pool_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.pool_selectionWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND selection_code IN('120','220'))BEGINSET @is_exists_other = 0;END;ELSEBEGINSET @is_exists_other = 1;END;-- remove existing data-- remove existing dataDELETE sopFROM dbo.snapshot_oap_participant sopWHERE  EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   @data dWHERE  sop.event_id = d.event_id AND sop.event_type = d.event_type AND sop.bizdate = d.bizdate AND sop.stage_type = d.stage_type AND d.event_id IS NOT NULL);-- insert dataINSERT INTO dbo.snapshot_oap_participant   (event_id   ,event_type   ,bizdate   ,stage_type   ,feed_attribute_id   ,feed_attribute_name   ,operation_type   ,name_profile_id   ,is_home_unknown_pk   ,is_home_unknown_fk   ,is_away_unknown_pk   ,is_away_unknown_fk   ,score_pct   ,last_score_pct   ,opening_score_pct   ,player_basket   ,is_pk   ,is_fk   ,is_scratch   ,is_offer_fgs   ,team_type   ,bet_type   ,comment   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at   ,update_at)SELECT event_id  ,event_type  ,bizdate  ,stage_type  ,feed_attribute_id  ,feed_attribute_name  ,operation_type  ,name_profile_id  ,is_home_unknown_pk  ,is_home_unknown_fk  ,is_away_unknown_pk  ,is_away_unknown_fk  ,score_pct  ,last_score_pct  ,opening_score_pct  ,player_basket  ,is_pk  ,is_fk  ,is_scratch  ,is_offer_fgs  ,team_type  ,bet_type  ,comment  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@now  ,@nowFROM   @dataWHERE  @is_exists_other = 1 OR name_profile_id NOT IN(120,220);END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_get_bizdate()RETURNS DATEASBEGINDECLARE    @bizdate               DATE  ,@time_offset            INT  ,@cut_off_time          TIME='06:30:00'  ,@system_date_time DATETIME2 SELECT @time_offset = time_offset  ,@cut_off_time = cut_off_timeFROM   dbo.config;SELECT @system_date_time=dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();--before 0630, return previouse bizdate--after 06:30, return current bizdateSELECT @bizdate=IIF(CONVERT(TIME, @system_date_time)>=@cut_off_time,CONVERT(DATE, @system_date_time),DATEADD(DAY,-1,CONVERT(DATE, @system_date_time)))RETURN @bizdate;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_divcal(    @data dbo.udt_ticket_divcal READONLY   ,@now              DATETIME2)ASBEGIN    DECLARE            @error_message  VARCHAR(250)          ,@operation_type  VARCHAR(50) = 'UPSERT';    MERGE INTO dbo.ticket_divcal /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/ AS t    USING @data AS s    ON t.system_id = s.system_id AND t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN UPDATE SET           --skip updating bizdate field coz it will be used in partition                          t.child_ticket_id = s.child_ticket_id,                          t.divcal_amount = s.divcal_amount,                          t.selective_refund_amount = s.selective_refund_amount,                          t.is_divcal_done = s.is_divcal_done,                          t.update_activity_id = s.activity_id,                          t.update_at = @now        WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('DELETE') AND t.update_activity_id < s.activity_id          THEN DELETE        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')          THEN          INSERT(bizdate                ,system_id                ,ticket_id                ,child_ticket_id                ,divcal_amount                ,selective_refund_amount                ,is_divcal_done                ,create_activity_id                ,create_at                ,update_activity_id                ,update_at)          VALUES                 (s.bizdate                 ,s.system_id                 ,s.ticket_id                 ,s.child_ticket_id                 ,s.divcal_amount                 ,s.selective_refund_amount                 ,s.is_divcal_done                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now                 ,s.activity_id                 ,@now);END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY)RETURNS BITASBEGINDECLARE    @need_save BIT = 0;-- activity status:DECLARE    @activity_code       TINYINT  ,@sell_request_status TINYINT  ,@ticket_status       TINYINT  ,@counter_offer_type  TINYINT  ,@collation_type      TINYINT;SELECT @activity_code = activity_code  ,@sell_request_status = sell_request_status  ,@ticket_status = ticket_status  ,@counter_offer_type = counter_offer_type  ,@collation_type = collation_typeFROM   @activity;-- check statusIF ---- accept(@activity_code = 3 --COLLATION_REPLY AND @ticket_status = 2 --SOLD AND (@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type <> 3)) --REVERSE_CANCELOR ---- reject((@collation_type IS NULL OR @collation_type = 0) --NULL,SELL AND @sell_request_status IN(5,6,7,9) -- TRADER_REJECTED,TRADER_TIMEOUT,CUSTOMER_TIMEOUT,SYSTEM_REJECTED-- @sell_request_status in (8) -- ABORTED) OR ---- reject: cancel(@collation_type = 2 --CANCEL AND @ticket_status = 5 --CANCELLED) OR ---- counter offer(@sell_request_status IN(3,4) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER_SENT,CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED AND @counter_offer_type IN(2,3) -- AUTO_COUNTER_OFFER,MANUAL_COUNTER_OFFER) OR ---- counter offer confirmed@activity_code = 5 --COUNTER_OFFER_CONFIRMBEGINSET @need_save = 1;END;RETURN @need_save;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_ticket_location_insert(@tvp_ticket_location dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@ticket_action                   TINYINT   ,@system_datetime               DATETIME2)ASBEGINDECLARE    @error_code              INT = 0  ,@error_message NVARCHAR(250) = '';INSERT INTO dbo.ticket_location   (system_id   ,sell_bizdate   ,ticket_id   ,activity_id   ,ticket_action   ,process_location   ,centre_no   ,window_no   ,is_svt   ,is_on_course   ,esc_no   ,terminal_no   ,ngbt_bet_mode   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT system_id  ,sell_bizdate  ,ticket_id  ,activity_id  ,@ticket_action  ,process_location  ,centre_no  ,window_no  ,is_svt  ,is_on_course  ,esc_no  ,terminal_no  ,ngbt_bet_mode  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_id  ,@system_datetime  ,activity_idFROM   @tvp_ticket_locationWHERE  ticket_id > 0;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_ticket_cashout(@tvp_activity     dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@cashout_ticket dbo.udt_cashout_ticket READONLY--Output Parameters   ,@return_msg               VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count  INT = 0  ,@return_code INT = 0;DECLARE    @now         DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@is_retry          BIT = 0  ,@activity_id    BIGINT  ,@result_code       INT;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYSELECT @activity_id = activity_id  ,@result_code = result_codeFROM   @tvp_activity;-- insert activity tableEXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert  @tvp_activity, @now, @is_retry OUTPUT;--result_code>0, that mean this is a invalid es ticketIF @result_code IS NULL OR @result_code = 0BEGINIF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.cashout_ticket a   INNER JOIN @cashout_ticket b ON a.system_id = b.system_id AND a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id)BEGINSELECT @return_msg = 'Cashout records already exist in DB.';THROW 50002,@return_msg,3;END;INSERT INTO dbo.cashout_ticket   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,cashout_amount   ,already_payout_amount   ,financial_indexs   ,request_cashout_amount   ,calculated_cashout_amount   ,cashout_datetime   ,cashout_bizdate   ,is_inplay   ,device_type   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.cashout_amount  ,a.already_payout_amount  ,a.financial_indexs  ,a.request_cashout_amount  ,a.calculated_cashout_amount  ,a.cashout_datetime  ,a.cashout_bizdate  ,a.is_inplay  ,a.device_type  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @cashout_ticket a;INSERT INTO dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,cashout_amount   ,already_payout_amount   ,financial_indexs   ,request_cashout_amount   ,calculated_cashout_amount   ,cashout_datetime   ,cashout_bizdate   ,is_inplay   ,device_type   ,settle_status   ,create_at   ,create_activity_id   ,update_at   ,update_activity_id)SELECT a.system_id  ,a.ticket_id  ,a.cashout_amount  ,a.already_payout_amount  ,a.financial_indexs  ,a.request_cashout_amount  ,a.calculated_cashout_amount  ,a.cashout_datetime  ,a.cashout_bizdate  ,a.is_inplay  ,a.device_type  ,0  ,@now  ,@activity_id  ,@now  ,@activity_idFROM   @cashout_ticket a;END;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;RETURN @return_code;END TRYBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_dummy_activity_insert(    -- activity    @tvp_activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg          NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0          ,@is_retry    BIT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2();    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @tvp_activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;IF(@return_code = 50002)BEGINDECLARE  @system_id         TINYINT,@activity_id        BIGINT;SELECT@system_id = system_id,@activity_id = activity_id FROM @tvp_activity;EXEC dbo.uspx_defer_activity_update  @system_id, @activity_id, 1, @system_datetime;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;            END            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_sell_request(@activity                    dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY   ,@sell_request                dbo.udt_sell_request READONLY   ,@leg                     dbo.udt_sell_request_leg READONLY   ,@counter_offer dbo.udt_sell_request_counter_offer READONLY   ,@account                       dbo.udt_ap_account READONLY   ,@location                     dbo.udt_ap_location READONLY   ,@tvp_ticket                        dbo.udt_ticket READONLY   ,@now                                    DATETIME2)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;DECLARE    @return_code INT = 0;IF(dbo.udf_save_sell_request(@activity)=1)BEGIN-- location and accountEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_location  @location, @now;EXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_account  @account, @now;-- sell_requestEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_updater  @sell_request, @leg, @now;-- counter offerEXEC dbo.uspx_sell_request_counter_offer  @activity, @sell_request, @counter_offer, @now;-- log_betEXEC dbo.uspx_log_bet_updater  @activity, @sell_request, @account, @tvp_ticket, @now;END;RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1508(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_system-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDIF NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tempdb.sys.tables WHERE ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfHOTicketUnpaid,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1  THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS UnpaidHOLiabilityAmount,-- SET 0 below , Because FO no forfeitedSUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )AS NoOfTodayPurgedTickets,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 0 AND ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )AS NoOfTodayPurgedHOTickets,SUM( CASE WHEN ticket_status = 2 and @bizdate = payout_expire_bizdate and ticket.is_head_office = 1 AND ticket.is_settled = 1 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPurgedHOAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, kickoffdate.event_settle_date,--tfe.selling_centre_no,--tfe.channel_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,ISNULL(fts.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id,5) AS channel_id, -- hard code 5 if case that activities purged1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ISNULL(t3.last_payout_date_win, ft.payout_expire_bizdate) as payout_expire_bizdate,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,ft.previous_payout_amt,ft.total_payout_amt,ftd.div_cal_amt,ft.ticket_status,ftd.is_settled-- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                 --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pools fmp ON fmp.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.get_kickoffdate_vw kickoffdate ON kickoffdate.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = ftb.pool_idINNER JOIN fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON fts.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idINNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftb.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_idLEFT JOIN (select --pool_id,t2.div_cal_done_bizdate, t2.payout_expire_bizdate, CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END AS last_payout_date_winfrom (select  t1.div_cal_done_bizdate,t1.payout_expire_bizdate,eetp.last_payout_date_win,row_number() over(partition by div_cal_done_bizdate,payout_expire_bizdate order by eetp.last_payout_date_win desc) as row_idfrom ##tmp_fo_edabi_rpt t1join  extend_expired_ticket_pay eetp WITH(SNAPSHOT) ON t1.payout_expire_bizdate >= eetp.branch_exceptional_closing_date AND t1.div_cal_done_bizdate < eetp.branch_reopen_date ) t2 where t2.row_id = 1 and CASE WHEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate >= t2.last_payout_date_win THEN t2.payout_expire_bizdate  ELSE t2.last_payout_date_win END >= @bizdate) t3 on t3.div_cal_done_bizdate=ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate and t3.payout_expire_bizdate=ft.payout_expire_bizdateWHERE ft.ticket_status = 2--AND ftc.leg_order = 1--For all up bet or a ticket including more than one bet, the figure will be grouped to the day by calculating the earliest calendar date corresponds to the “Day” of the match in the betAND ftd.div_cal_amt - ft.previous_payout_amt >0--covers match pool winning and refund tickets --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 ConcludedAND fme.event_type_id = 2           --AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Match pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id --FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('HAD', 'FHAD', 'ETHAD', 'HHAD', 'HDC', 'ETHDC', 'HILO', 'FHLO', --'ETHILO', 'CHLO', 'ETCHLO', 'CRS', 'FCRS', 'ETCRS', 'FTS', 'NTS', 'ETNTS', 'TTG', 'ETTTG', 'OOE', 'FGS', 'HFT','MSPC', 'DHCP')--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.event_settle_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sbpoolcategoryORDER BY ticket.event_settle_date, ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.sbpoolcategory OPTION(MAXDOP 1) END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

'fo_msg_races', @action_text = 'HOT TO WARM', @start_time = SYSDATETIME()DELETE a OUTPUT deleted.* INTO dbo.expired_fo_msg_racesFROM dbo.fo_msg_races a WITH (SNAPSHOT)INNER JOIN @batch_expired_event_list batchON a.parent_event_id = batch.event_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5)SELECT @inserted_records = @@ROWCOUNT, @end_time = sysdatetime()INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log( bizdate, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_bizdate, update_time )VALUES( @bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, @inserted_records, @bizdate, @end_time )SELECT @table_name = '@@tmp_expired_event_list', @action_text = 'DELETE completed FO Event List', @start_time = SYSDATETIME()DELETE FROM tmpFROM @batch_expired_event_list batchINNER JOIN @tmp_expired_event_list tmpON batch.event_id = tmp.event_idOPTION (MAXDOP 5, LOOP JOIN, FORCE ORDER)SELECT @deleted_records = @@ROWCOUNT, @end_time = SYSDATETIME()INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log( bizdate, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_bizdate, update_time )VALUES( @bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, @deleted_records, @bizdate, @end_time )COMMIT TRANSACTIONSET @retry = 3    -- after 1 successful move, we give back to allow 3 attemptsENDELSEBEGIN    -- ELSE part: num of records <=0-- That's good, no more records to moveSET @error_code = 0   -- no errorSET @retry = 0        -- exit the while loop of retry countENDEND TRYBEGIN CATCHSET @retry -= 1IF (@retry > 0 AND ERROR_NUMBER() in (41302, 41305, 41325, 41301, 41839, 1205))BEGINIF @@TRANCOUNT > 0ROLLBACK TRANSACTIONWAITFOR DELAY '00:00:01'   -- sleep for 1 second to retry againENDELSEBEGINIF @@TRANCOUNT > 0ROLLBACK TRANSACTIONSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()SELECT @action_text = 'Move to WARM exception:'+convert(varchar(15),@error_code)+'/'+convert(varchar(500),@error_msg)SELECT @table_name = 'FO Msg Event Tables', @end_time = SYSDATETIME()INSERT INTO dbo.eod_log( bizdate, stored_proc_name, table_name, action_text, start_time, end_time, num_records, update_bizdate, update_time )VALUES( @bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @table_name, @action_text, @start_time, @end_time, 0, @bizdate, @end_time )SELECT @error_code, @error_msgRETURN;ENDEND CATCHEND  -- end retry while loopIF @error_code = 0BEGININSERT INTO dbo.fo_housekeep_history (bizdate, stored_proc_name, create_time)VALUES (@bizdate, @stored_proc_name, @start_time)ENDRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_ap_activity_insert(    -- activity    @tvp_activity dbo.udt_log_activity READONLY    --Output Parameters   ,@return_msg          NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGIN    SET NOCOUNT ON;    -- Set Default values    DECLARE            @tran_count  INT = 0          ,@return_code INT = 0;    DECLARE            @system_datetime DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()          ,@is_retry              BIT = 0;    -- Start Unit Of Work    SELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;    IF XACT_STATE() = 0    BEGIN        BEGIN TRANSACTION;    END;    BEGIN TRY        -- insert activity table        EXEC dbo.uspx_activity_insert              @tvp_activity,             @system_datetime,             @is_retry OUTPUT;        -- Commit Unit of Work        IF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1        BEGIN            COMMIT TRANSACTION;        END;        RETURN @return_code;    END TRY    BEGIN CATCH        IF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0        BEGIN            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;        END;        BEGIN            SELECT @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER()            WHERE  @return_code = 0;            SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);        END;    END CATCH;    RETURN @return_code;END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()RETURNS DATETIME2WITH NATIVE_COMPILATION, SCHEMABINDINGASBEGIN ATOMIC WITH(TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL = SNAPSHOT,LANGUAGE = N'English')RETURN SYSDATETIME();END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1523](@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE  --@tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemDECLARE @system_id int select @system_id = system_id from system_info-- agpSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfTicketWithLiability,ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 0 and ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN ticket.actual_div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_actual_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_actual_div_cal_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END), 0)AS TicketLiabilityAmount,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)AS NoOfHOLiabilityTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.is_head_office = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) <> 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_div_cal_amt, isnull(parent_div_cal_amt,0)) ELSE 0 END)AS HOLiabilityAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt > ticket.total_payout_amt AND ticket.total_payout_amt > 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfErrorProfitTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and ticket.div_cal_amt > ticket.total_payout_amt AND ticket.total_payout_amt > 0 THEN  ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.total_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS ErrorProfitAmount,COUNT(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and (ticket.div_cal_amt < ticket.total_payout_amt) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfErrorLossTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN is_concluded = 1 and (ticket.div_cal_amt < ticket.total_payout_amt)THEN  ticket.total_payout_amt - ticket.div_cal_amt ELSE 0 END)AS ErrorLossAmount,  -- when batch divcal max(fmcd.last_payout_bizdate)  wagering status of the pool is PayoutStarted today (Business date).COUNT(CASE WHEN (ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) <> 0) THEN 1 END)AS NoOfRefundTickets,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) <> 0) THEN ticket.refund_amt - isnull(ticket.previous_refund_amt, isnull(parent_refund_amt, 0)) ELSE 0 END)AS RefundLiabilityAmount FROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,edabi_vw.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,ft.is_head_office,ft.payout_expire_bizdate,ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate,ftd.is_concluded,AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS actual_div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS div_cal_amt,AVG(ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id) AS refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for same ticketAVG(previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftdbb.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftdbb.ticket_id) AS previous_refund_amt,-- previous div cal history for parent ticketAVG(previous_ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.actual_div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_actual_div_cal_amt, AVG(previous_ftd.refund_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY previous_ftd.ticket_id) AS parent_refund_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_id        INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                    INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw previous_ftd on ft.parent_ticket_id = previous_ftd.ticket_idLEFT JOIN ( -- check previous latest dividend historyselect a.ticket_id, a.div_cal_amt, a.actual_div_cal_amt, a.bizdate, a.refund_amt from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ainner join ( select ftdbb.ticket_id , max(bizdate) as bizdate from fo_ticket_dividend_by_bizdate_vw ftdbbinner join fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd on ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate and ftdbb.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_idwhere ftdbb.bizdate < @bizdate group by ftdbb.ticket_id) b on a.ticket_id = b.ticket_id and a.bizdate = b.bizdate) previous_ftdbb on previous_ftdbb.ticket_id = ft.ticket_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0--AND fad.valid_bizdate = @bizdate--which result rectification/refund taken place today AND ftd.div_cal_done_bizdate = @bizdate -- fo_activities_divcal_vw not include case that divcal during payAND (ftd.div_cal_amt > 0 or previous_ftdbb.div_cal_amt > 0 or previous_ftd.div_cal_amt > 0)AND ft.ticket_status in (2,7,8) --AND fmps.pool_status = 41--41PayoutStarted     AND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--14, 16, 18, 19, 20, 32, 33, 34/*SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_typeWHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC','JKC','TNC')*/--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_scheduler_log_task_status_update(--Input Parameters@task_id            BIGINT   ,@task_status       TINYINT   --Output Parameters    ,@return_msg  NVARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINSET NOCOUNT ON;-- Set Default valuesDECLARE    @tran_count            INT = 0  ,@return_code           INT = 0  ,@now             DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@now_with_offset DATETIME2 = dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset();-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYEXECUTE @return_code = dbo.uspx_scheduler_log_task_status_update @task_id,@task_status,@now,@return_msg OUT;EXECUTE @return_code = dbo.uspx_scheduler_log_adhoc_task_update @task_id,@now,@return_msg OUT;-- Commit Unit of WorkIF @tran_count = 0 AND @@trancount = 1BEGINCOMMIT TRANSACTION;END;END TRY-- Error HandlingBEGIN CATCH-- Rollback Unit of workIF @tran_count = 0 AND XACT_STATE() <> 0BEGINROLLBACK TRANSACTION;END;BEGINSET @return_code = ERROR_NUMBER();SET @return_msg = SUBSTRING('ERROR in '+ERROR_PROCEDURE()+' line '+CONVERT(VARCHAR(100),ERROR_LINE())+': '+ERROR_MESSAGE(),1,500);END;END CATCH;RETURN @return_code;-- Reset NOCOUNT to OFFSET NOCOUNT OFF;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_summary_snapshot_pool_combinations(@task_id             BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id       BIGINT   ,@pool_id             BIGINT   ,@return_msg    VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @payout_date            DATE  ,@event_type          TINYINT  ,@result_count            INT  ,@pool_update_at DATETIME2(7)  ,@sports_id           TINYINT;SELECT @payout_date = ISNULL(settle_bizdate,ISNULL(payout_start_bizdate,refund_bizdate))  ,@event_type = event_type  ,@sports_id = sports_id  ,@pool_update_at = update_atFROM   dbo.poolsWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id;SELECT r.pool_id  ,r.line_id  ,r.result_id  ,r.combination_id  ,r.is_payout_refund  ,CAST(IIF(@payout_date IS NULL OR r.result_status = 19 OR r.is_payout = 0,0,r.result_status) AS TINYINT) AS result_status  ,r.pay_factor_1  ,r.pay_factor_2  ,@event_type AS                                                                                             event_type  ,@sports_id AS                                                                                              sports_id  ,IIF(@pool_update_at > r.update_at,@pool_update_at,r.update_at) AS                                          update_atFROM   dbo.pool_combination_result rWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id;SET @result_count = @@rowcount;DECLARE    @now DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2();UPDATE dbo.log_summary_snapshot_taskSET    task_status = IIF(is_today = 1,1,2), -- History data no need to update unsettled_ticket_bet_financialaffected_result_count = @result_count,payout_date = @payout_date,update_at = @nowWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND task_id = @task_id;END;

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.usp_summary_snapshot_summary(@task_id             BIGINT   ,@checkpoint_id       BIGINT   ,@payout_date           DATE   ,@return_msg    VARCHAR(500) = '' OUTPUT)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now             DATETIME2(7)  ,@system_datetime DATETIME2(7) = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@tran_count               INT = 0  ,@return_code              INT = 0  ,@create_at       DATETIME2(7)  ,@prev_bizdate            DATE;IF EXISTS(SELECT 1FROM   dbo.business_dayWHERE  bizdate = @payout_date AND aggregate_at IS NOT NULL)BEGINSET @return_msg = 'Aggregate data was generated.';RETURN @return_code;END;SELECT TOP 1 @create_at = create_atFROM         dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshotWHERE        bizdate = @payout_date;-- Ensure data at least update each 15 minutesIF @create_at IS NOT NULL AND DATEADD(MINUTE,15,@create_at) > @system_datetimeBEGINSELECT    @now = MAX(update_at)FROM(SELECT MAX(update_at) AS update_atFROM     dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financialWHERE   settle_bizdate = @payout_dateUNION ALLSELECT MAX(update_at) AS update_atFROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticketWHERE  cashout_bizdate = @payout_date) a;IF @now IS NULL OR @now <= @create_atBEGINSET @return_msg = 'No new dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial or dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket have been identified.';RETURN @return_code;END;END;ELSEBEGINSET @now = @system_datetime;END;-- Start Unit Of WorkSELECT @tran_count = @@trancount;IF XACT_STATE() = 0BEGINBEGIN TRANSACTION;END;BEGIN TRYSELECT TOP 1 @prev_bizdate = ISNULL(bizdate,@payout_date)FROM         dbo.business_dayWHERE        bizdate < @payout_date AND aggregate_at IS NOT NULLORDER BY bizdate DESC;DECLARE    @cashout AS TABLE(system_id                    TINYINT NOT NULL   ,ticket_id                     BIGINT NOT NULL   ,is_allup                         BIT NOT NULL   ,allup_level                  TINYINT NOT NULL   ,allup_type                   TINYINT NULL   ,bizdate                         DATE NOT NULL   ,total_investment      DECIMAL(28,12)   ,already_payout_amount DECIMAL(28,12)   ,cashout_amount        DECIMAL(28,12)   ,concluded_invest      DECIMAL(28,12)   ,pnl                   DECIMAL(28,12)   ,settle_status                TINYINT);INSERT INTO @cashout   (system_id   ,ticket_id   ,is_allup   ,allup_level   ,allup_type   ,bizdate   ,total_investment   ,already_payout_amount   ,cashout_amount   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,settle_status)SELECT utbc.system_id  ,utbc.ticket_id  ,t.is_allup  ,t.allup_level  ,t.allup_type  ,utbc.cashout_bizdate  ,t.total_investment  ,already_payout_amount  ,utbc.cashout_amount  ,utbc.concluded_invest  ,utbc.pnl  ,utbc.settle_statusFROM   dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket utbc   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket t ON utbc.system_id = t.system_id AND utbc.ticket_id = t.ticket_id AND utbc.cashout_bizdate = @payout_date;UPDATE        uctSET           uct.concluded_invest = uct.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0),uct.pnl = uct.cashout_amount+ISNULL(uct.already_payout_amount,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_dividend,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0)-(uct.total_investment-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_investment,0)-ISNULL(normal_settled.normal_refund,0))FROM          @cashout uct  OUTER APPLY(SELECT    SUM(f.dividend) AS   normal_dividend ,SUM(f.investment) AS normal_investment ,SUM(f.refund) AS     normal_refundFROM(SELECT uf.dividend  ,uf.investment  ,uf.refundFROM     dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial ufWHERE   uf.system_id = uct.system_id AND uf.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id AND uf.settle_bizdate > @prev_bizdate AND uf.settle_bizdate < uct.bizdate AND uf.settle_status IN(1,4)UNION ALLSELECT f.dividend  ,f.investment  ,f.refundFROM   dbo.ticket_bet_financial fWHERE  f.system_id = uct.system_id AND f.ticket_id = uct.ticket_id AND f.settle_bizdate <= @prev_bizdate) f) normal_settledWHERE uct.is_allup = 1 AND uct.settle_status = 1 OPTION(FORCE ORDER);UPDATE utbcSET    utbc.concluded_invest = uct.concluded_invest,utbc.pnl = uct.pnlFROM   @cashout uct   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_cashout_ticket utbc ON uct.system_id = utbc.system_id AND uct.ticket_id = utbc.ticket_idWHERE  uct.is_allup = 1 AND uct.settle_status = 1 OPTION(FORCE ORDER);DECLARE    @schedule_summary dbo.udt_schedule_summary_daily;INSERT INTO @schedule_summary   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,bet_type   ,payout_type   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund)SELECT 2  ,p.event_id  ,utbs.pool_id  ,utbs.line_id  ,IIF(utbs.bet_type = 53,utbs.combination_id,0)  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,utbs.bet_type  ,1  ,SUM(utbs.unit_bet)  ,SUM(utbc.cashout_amount-utbs.unit_bet)  ,0FROM   @cashout utbc   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs ON utbc.system_id = utbs.system_id AND utbc.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id AND utbc.is_allup = 0   INNER JOIN dbo.pools p ON utbs.pool_id = p.pool_idGROUP BY p.event_id,utbs.pool_id,utbs.line_id,IIF(utbs.bet_type = 53,utbs.combination_id,0),utbs.bet_type;INSERT INTO @schedule_summary   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,bet_type   ,payout_type   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund)SELECT 2 AS              sports_id  ,event_id  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,0 AS              combination_id  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,bet_type  ,2 AS              payout_type  ,SUM(investment)  ,SUM(profit_loss)  ,SUM(refund)FROM     dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financialWHERE   settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND settle_status IN(1,4) AND is_allup = 0 AND event_type = 2 AND sports_id = 2 AND cashout_status < 2 AND bet_type != 53GROUP BY event_id,pool_id,line_id,bet_typeUNION ALLSELECT 2 AS              sports_id  ,f.event_id  ,f.pool_id  ,f.line_id  ,utbs.combination_id  ,CAST(0 AS BIT) AS is_cross_line  ,f.bet_type  ,2 AS              payout_type  ,SUM(f.investment)  ,SUM(f.profit_loss)  ,SUM(f.refund)FROM   dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_financial f   INNER JOIN dbo.unsettled_ticket_bet_single utbs ON f.system_id = utbs.system_id AND f.ticket_id = utbs.ticket_id AND f.bet_id = utbs.bet_id AND f.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND f.settle_status IN(1,4) AND is_allup = 0 AND f.event_type = 2 AND f.sports_id = 2 AND cashout_status < 2 AND f.bet_type = 53GROUP BY f.event_id,f.pool_id,f.line_id,utbs.combination_id,f.bet_type;DELETE aFROM dbo.aggregate_schedule_summary aWHERE  a.settle_bizdate = @payout_date AND a.is_settled = 0 AND a.sports_id = 2 AND a.event_type = 2;INSERT INTO dbo.aggregate_schedule_summary   (is_settled   ,event_id   ,pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,is_cross_line   ,sports_id   ,event_type   ,settle_bizdate   ,investment   ,refund   ,profit_loss   ,cashout_investment   ,cashout_profit_loss   ,create_at)SELECT 0  ,d.event_id  ,d.pool_id  ,d.line_id  ,d.combination_id  ,0  ,2  ,2  ,@payout_date  ,d.investment+d.cashout_investment  ,d.refund  ,d.profit_loss+d.cashout_profit_loss  ,d.cashout_investment  ,d.cashout_profit_loss  ,@nowFROM(SELECT event_id  ,pool_id  ,line_id  ,combination_id  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,concluded_invest)) AS investment  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,refund)) AS           refund  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,0,pnl)) AS              profit_loss  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,concluded_invest,0)) AS cashout_investment  ,SUM(IIF(payout_type = 1,pnl,0)) AS              cashout_profit_lossFROM   @schedule_summaryGROUP BY event_id,pool_id,line_id,combination_id) AS d;DELETE FROM dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshotWHERE       bizdate = @payout_date;-- Normal match singleINSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,0  ,2  ,0  ,bet_type  ,1  ,@payout_date  ,SUM(concluded_invest)  ,SUM(pnl)  ,SUM(refund)  ,-1  ,@checkpoint_id  ,@nowFROM   @schedule_summaryWHERE  payout_type = 2GROUP BY sports_id,bet_type;-- Normal tournament(single/allup) and HR(single only)INSERT INTO dbo.daily_profit_loss_snapshot   (sports_id   ,event_id   ,payout_type   ,is_allup   ,allup_type   ,allup_level   ,bizdate   ,concluded_invest   ,pnl   ,refund   ,last_result_checkpoint_id   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at)SELECT sports_id  ,event_id  ,2 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_pool_combination_odds_change(--Meta Data@checkpoint_id                                 BIGINT = 0   ,@operation_type                           VARCHAR(50)--Input Parameters   ,@event_operation_status                       TINYINT   ,@data                   dbo.udt_pool_combination_odds READONLY)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now                        DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@i                                INT = 1  ,@error_message           VARCHAR(250)  ,@pool_id                       BIGINT  ,@line_id                     SMALLINT  ,@is_closing                       BIT  ,@combination_id                   INT  ,@odds_current          DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_opening          DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_true_current     DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_true_opening     DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_preevent_opening DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_preevent_closing DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_inplay_opening   DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_closing          DECIMAL(28,12)  ,@odds_closing_nomargin DECIMAL(28,12);WHILE @i > 0BEGINSELECT @pool_id = pool_id  ,@line_id = line_id  ,@combination_id = combination_id  ,@is_closing = is_closing  ,@odds_current = odds_current  ,@odds_opening = odds_opening  ,@odds_true_current = odds_true_current  ,@odds_true_opening = odds_true_opening  ,@odds_preevent_opening = odds_preevent_opening  ,@odds_preevent_closing = odds_preevent_closing  ,@odds_inplay_opening = odds_inplay_opening  ,@odds_closing = odds_closing  ,@odds_closing_nomargin = odds_closing_nomarginFROM   @dataWHERE  row_num = @i;IF @@rowcount = 0BEGINSET @i = 0;END;ELSEBEGINDECLARE    @is_updated TINYINT = 0;-- In order to adapt to some pools which have In-Play stage only without Pre-Event stageIF @odds_inplay_opening IS NULL AND @event_operation_status BETWEEN 21 AND 30BEGINSELECT @odds_inplay_opening = odds_inplay_openingFROM   dbo.pool_combination_oddsWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND line_id = @line_id AND combination_id = @combination_id;IF @odds_inplay_opening IS NULLBEGINSET @odds_inplay_opening = @odds_current;END;END;IF @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT')BEGINUPDATE dbo.pool_combination_oddsSET    odds_closing = ISNULL(@odds_closing,odds_closing),odds_preevent_closing = ISNULL(@odds_preevent_closing,odds_preevent_closing),odds_closing_nomargin = ISNULL(@odds_closing_nomargin,odds_closing_nomargin),odds_true_closing = ISNULL(@odds_true_current,ISNULL(odds_true_closing,odds_true_current))WHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND line_id = @line_id AND combination_id = @combination_id AND @is_closing = 1;UPDATE dbo.pool_combination_oddsSET    odds_current = ISNULL(@odds_current,odds_current),odds_opening = ISNULL(@odds_opening,odds_opening),odds_true_opening = ISNULL(@odds_true_opening,odds_true_opening),odds_true_current = ISNULL(@odds_true_current,odds_true_current),odds_preevent_opening = ISNULL(@odds_preevent_opening,odds_preevent_opening),odds_inplay_opening = ISNULL(@odds_inplay_opening,odds_inplay_opening),checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_id,update_at = @nowWHERE  pool_id = @pool_id AND line_id = @line_id AND combination_id = @combination_id;IF @@rowcount > 0BEGINSET @is_updated = 1;END;IF @is_updated = 0 AND @operation_type = 'UPDATE'BEGINSET @error_message = 'Record not updated, pool_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@pool_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'')+', line_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@line_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'')+', combination_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@combination_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'');THROW 50019,@error_message,3;END;END;IF @operation_type = 'INSERT' OR @is_updated = 0 AND @operation_type = 'UPSERT'BEGININSERT INTO dbo.pool_combination_odds   (pool_id   ,line_id   ,combination_id   ,odds_current   ,odds_opening   ,odds_true_current   ,odds_true_opening   ,odds_true_closing   ,odds_preevent_opening   ,odds_preevent_closing   ,odds_inplay_opening   ,odds_closing   ,odds_closing_nomargin   ,checkpoint_id   ,create_at   ,update_at)VALUES   (@pool_id   ,@line_id   ,@combination_id   ,@odds_current   ,@odds_opening   ,@odds_true_current   ,@odds_true_opening   ,IIF(@is_closing = 1,@odds_true_current,NULL)   ,@odds_preevent_opening   ,@odds_preevent_closing   ,@odds_inplay_opening   ,@odds_closing   ,@odds_closing_nomargin   ,@checkpoint_id   ,@now   ,@now);IF @@rowcount = 0BEGIN -- Record not updated or insertedSET @error_message = 'Record not updated or inserted, pool_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@pool_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'')+', line_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@line_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'')+', combination_id:'+ISNULL(CAST(@combination_id AS VARCHAR(50)),'');THROW 50019,@error_message,3;END;END;IF @operation_type = 'DELETE'BEGINSET @error_message = 'Record not be deleted';THROW 50019,@error_message,3;END;SET @i+=1;END;END;END;

CREATE FUNCTION dbo.udf_get_datetime2_with_offset()RETURNS DATETIME2ASBEGINDECLARE    @time_offset INT;SELECT @time_offset = time_offsetFROM   dbo.config;RETURN DATEADD(second,ISNULL(@time_offset,0),SYSDATETIME());END;

dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw orig_fts ON ft.orig_ticket_id = orig_fts.ticket_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 5, 7)AND ft.selling_bizdate = @bizdateUNIONSELECTDISTINCT -1 as ticket_count,ft.ticket_id, fts.selling_centre_no, ft.sports_id,ftb.frontend_id, CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1524(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE -- @tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULL-- temp testing only-- set @bizdate  = 20190622IF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)END--get tickets channel by system--INSERT INTO @tvpnc_fo_edabi(ticket_id, channel_id, selling_centre_no, sbpoolcategory, system_id)--EXEC dbo.uspx_get_tickets_channel_by_systemSELECT @bizdateAS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,COUNT(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfUnsettledTicket,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnsettledLiabilityFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0)AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--tfe.channel_id,ftc.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory, --1 FO , 2 --PMUISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,edabi_vw.channel_id,1 AS sbpoolcategory,ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0)AS paid_bizdate,--to check if ticket be paidAVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id) AS previous_payout_amt, AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id)AS total_payout_amt, AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id)AS div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_combinations_vw ftc ON ft.ticket_id = ftc.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id --INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id INNER JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_id                --INNER JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON ftc.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idWHERE ft.is_cancel = 0AND ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8) -- sell, paid, partial_paidAND ftd.div_cal_amt > 0AND fme.event_type_id = 1--AND ftc.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--SELECT bet_type_id FROM fo_msg_dict_bet_type--WHERE bet_type IN ('CHP', 'GPW', 'GPF', 'TPS', 'TQL', 'TSPC', 'JKC', 'TNC', 'MSPC') --special pool tournament TSPC eventlevel1, match  MSPC eventlevel2--)--AND ft.ticket_id = 57 ) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory   OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

CREATE PROCEDURE usp_agp_get_edabi_rpt_1521(@error_codeintoutput,@error_msgvarchar(500)output,@bizdateint)ASBEGIN TRY--DECLARE -- @tvpnc_fo_edabidbo.tvpnc_fo_edabi SET NOCOUNT ONSELECT @error_code = 0, @error_msg = NULLIF @bizdate is nullBEGINSET @bizdate=dbo.udf_dateadd_bizdate(dbo.udf_get_data_grouping_bizdate(), -1)ENDSELECT @bizdate    AS BusinessDate, ISNULL(ticket.channel_id, 0)AS Channel,  ISNULL(ticket.selling_centre_no, 0)AS LiabilityCentreNo,  ISNULL(ticket.bet_type_id, 0)AS BetType,  ISNULL(ticket.sbpoolcategory, 0)AS SBPoolCategory,--COUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.selling_centre_no <> ticket.pay_centre_no)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketPaid,-- SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate AND ticket.selling_centre_no <> ticket.pay_centre_no)  THEN ticket.total_payout_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPayoutAmount,-- COUNT( CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 or ticket.paid_bizdate is null THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid ,-- SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 or ticket.paid_bizdate is null THEN ticket.div_cal_amt -  ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmountCOUNT( CASE WHEN (ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate)  THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketPaid,SUM(CASE WHEN (ticket.paid_bizdate = @bizdate)  THEN ticket.total_payout_amt - ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END )AS TodayPayoutAmount,COUNT( CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 AND ticket.div_cal_amt > 0 THEN 1 END)AS NoOfTicketUnpaid ,SUM(CASE WHEN ticket.paid_bizdate = 0 AND ticket.div_cal_amt > 0 THEN ticket.div_cal_amt -  ticket.previous_payout_amt ELSE 0 END)AS UnpaidLiabilityAmountFROM (SELECTDISTINCT ft.ticket_id, --ISNULL(tfe.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fasc_sell.centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) AS selling_centre_no,--selling_centre_no--ISNULL(fts.pay_centre_no, 0) AS pay_centre_no,--pay_centre_no--tfe.channel_id,ISNULL(edabi_vw.channel_id, 5) AS channel_id,fmp.bet_type_id,--tfe.sbpoolcategory,--1 FO , 2 --PMU1 AS sbpoolcategory,      --1 FO , 2 --PMU   ISNULL(ft.paid_bizdate, 0) AS paid_bizdate,--to check if ticket be paid-- AVG(ft.total_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id)AS total_payout_amt, -- AVG(ft.previous_payout_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ft.ticket_id)AS previous_payout_amt, -- AVG(ftd.div_cal_amt) OVER(PARTITION BY ftd.ticket_id)AS div_cal_amtft.total_payout_amt, ft.previous_payout_amt, ftd.div_cal_amtFROM dbo.fo_tickets_vw ftINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_betlines_vw ftb ON ft.ticket_id = ftb.ticket_idINNER JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_dividends_vw ftd ON ft.ticket_id = ftd.ticket_id INNER JOIN fo_msg_pools fmp ON ftb.pool_id = fmp.pool_id    INNER JOIN fo_msg_event_id_with_leg_ids fmeiwli ON fmp.pool_id = fmeiwli.pool_id                INNER JOIN fo_msg_events fme on fmeiwli.event_id =fme.event_idLEFT JOIN dbo.get_edabi_channel_vw edabi_vw ON ft.orig_ticket_id = edabi_vw.ticket_id--LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_ticket_supplymentary_vw fts ON ft.ticket_id = fts.ticket_id--INNER JOIN @tvpnc_fo_edabi tfe ON tfe.ticket_id = ft.ticket_id                --LEFT JOIN dbo.fo_activities_source_cbt_vw fasc_sell ON edabi_vw.fo_activity_id = fasc_sell.fo_activity_id--INNER JOIN dbo.fo_msg_pool_status fmps ON fmps.pool_id = ftc.pool_idWHERE ft.ticket_status in (2, 7, 8) -- sell, paid, partial_paid--AND ft.payout_expire_bizdate <=@bizdate--until the corresponding tickets are forfeited --AND fmps.pool_status IN (41, 60)--41PayoutStarted, 60 Concluded--AND (ftd.div_cal_amt >0)--winning and refund tickets AND fme.event_type_id = 1        --AND fmp.bet_type_id IN --(--Tournament pool bet_type_id--14, 16, 18, 19, 20, 32, 33, 34--)AND is_head_office = 0) AS ticketGROUP BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategoryORDER BY ticket.channel_id, ticket.selling_centre_no, ticket.bet_type_id, ticket.sbpoolcategory   OPTION(MAXDOP 1)END TRYBEGIN CATCHSELECT @error_code = ERROR_NUMBER(), @error_msg = ERROR_MESSAGE()RETURN @error_codeEND CATCHRETURN @error_code

fme.event_type_id = 2           --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN--(--Match pool bet_type_id --'HAD', 'FHAD', 'ETHAD', 'HHAD', 'HDC', 'ETHDC', 'HILO', 'FHLO', 'ETHILO', 'CHLO', 'ETCHLO', 'CRS', 'FCRS', figure will be grouped to the day by calculating the earliest match date corresponds to the “Day” of the match in the ticket. AND ISNULL(edabi_vw.selling_centre_no, 0) <> ISNULL(fasc_cancel.centre_no,0)AND ft.is_cancel = 1AND ft.ticket_status = 5--5CANCELLEDAND fac.create_bizdate = @bizdate --cancelled on today (business date)AND fme.event_type_id = 2         --AND ftc.bet_type_id IN--(--Match pool bet_type_id --'HAD', 'FHAD', 'ETHAD', 'HHAD', 'HDC', 'ETHDC', 'HILO', 'FHLO', 'ETHILO', 'CHLO', 'ETCHLO', 'CRS', 'FCRS', CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.uspx_pool_odds_current_change(--Meta Data@checkpoint_id                            BIGINT = 0   ,@operation_type                      VARCHAR(50)--Input Parameters   ,@data           dbo.udt_pool_odds_current_change READONLY)ASBEGINDECLARE    @now              DATETIME2 = dbo.udfnc_get_datetime2()  ,@bizdate               DATE = dbo.udf_get_bizdate()  ,@end_at           DATETIME2 = '2999-12-31'  ,@error_message VARCHAR(250);DECLARE    @input_count_row INT = 0;SELECT @input_count_row = COUNT(1)FROM   @data;IF @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPDATE','UPSERT')BEGINMERGE INTO dbo.pool_odds_current_change /*WITH (HOLDLOCK)*/AS tUSING @data AS sON t.pool_id = s.pool_id AND t.line_id = s.line_id AND t.combination_id = s.combination_id AND t.begin_at = s.begin_at AND t.event_operation_status = s.event_operation_status WHEN MATCHED AND @operation_type IN('UPDATE','UPSERT')  THEN UPDATE SET   t.odds = s.odds,  t.odds_nomargin = s.odds_nomargin,  t.odds_opening = s.odds_opening,  t.odds_last = s.odds_last,  t.event_operation_status = s.event_operation_status,  t.checkpoint_id = @checkpoint_id,  t.update_at = @nowWHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET AND @operation_type IN('INSERT','UPSERT')  THEN  INSERT(bizdate,pool_id,line_id,combination_id,begin_at,end_at,odds,odds_nomargin,odds_opening,odds_last,event_operation_status,checkpoint_id,create_at,update_at)  VALUES (ISNULL(s.bizdate,@bizdate) ,s.pool_id ,s.line_id ,s.combination_id ,s.begin_at ,@end_at ,s.odds ,s.odds_nomargin ,s.odds_opening ,s.odds_last ,s.event_operation_status ,@checkpoint_id ,@now ,@now);IF @@rowcount != @input_count_rowBEGINSET @error_message = 'Record not inserted/updated';THROW 50019,@error_message,3;END;END;ELSEBEGINIF @operation_type = 'DELETE'BEGINSET @error_message = 'Record must not be deleted';THROW 50019,@error_message,3;END;END;END;
